allow: Bash(printf '%s\\n' "const fs = require\(''fs''\);" "const filePath = ''C:\\\\Users\\\\muham\\\\OneDrive\\\\Masaüstü\\\\studyhell_site\\\\.claude\\\\worktrees\\\\quirky-shannon\\\\data\\\\pmp_questions.json'';" "const data = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(filePath, ''utf8''\)\);" "const arr = Array.isArray\(data\) ? data : \(data.questions || []\);" "const transformed = { questions: arr.map\(q => \({ text: q.text, answers: q.answers, correct: q.correct !== undefined ? q.correct : 1, category: q.category || '''', domain: q.domain || '''', explanation: q.explanation || '''' }\)\) };" "fs.writeFileSync\(filePath, JSON.stringify\(transformed, null, 2\)\);" "console.log\(''Done. Questions count:'', transformed.questions.length\);")
